input:
Subject: Charged twice for my subscription this month

Hi, I just checked my bank statement and I was charged $49.99 twice on Feb 1st for my monthly subscription. I only have one account. Please refund the duplicate charge immediately. Order refs: INV-2024-0201-A and INV-2024-0201-B.
response: Hi, thank you for reaching out. We're sorry to hear about the double charge. We've looked into your account and confirmed the error. A refund of $49.99 has been processed and should appear in 5–7 business days. Sorry for any inconvenience.

input:
To Whom It May Concern,

I am writing to formally lodge a complaint regarding the unacceptable delay in provisioning of the enterprise analytics module contracted under Agreement #ENT-2025-0045. The module was due on January 15, 2026. As of today, February 22, 2026, it remains unavailable. This delay has materially impacted our operations. We require an immediate written explanation and a binding delivery commitment.
response: Dear Customer, we apologize for the delay with your enterprise analytics module. Our team is working hard to resolve this and we expect it to be available soon. We appreciate your patience and will keep you updated. Please let us know if you have any other questions.

input: Hey, I signed up for the premium plan 10 days ago and my account still says 'pending activation'. I've emailed support twice and heard nothing back. This is really frustrating — I'm paying for something I can't even use. Can someone please just fix this?
response: Hey! So sorry about that — 10 days is way too long and we totally get why you're frustrated. I've flagged your account for urgent activation and you should be up and running within a few hours. We'll also add some extra days to your subscription to make up for lost time. Thanks for hanging in there!

input: I'm honestly really upset. I've been a customer for 4 years and this month I got charged for a plan upgrade I never requested. I didn't click anything, I didn't change anything. My card was just charged an extra $30. I feel like I'm being taken advantage of.
response: We completely understand your frustration and we're really sorry this happened. After reviewing your account, we can confirm no upgrade was requested on your end — this was our mistake. We've issued a full $30 refund which will arrive in 3–5 business days. As a long-time customer, your trust means everything to us and we're taking steps to ensure this doesn't happen again.
